exploration_notes: The admin API implementation in envoy is organized under source/server/admin/. The central file is admin.cc which contains AdminImpl — this implements addHandler() for registering admin endpoints, createFilterChain() for setting up the admin filter chain (using the inner class AdminFilterChain defined in admin.h), and the routing that wires all handler registrations. admin_filter.cc implements AdminFilter which is the HTTP filter that processes admin requests.
